reviews.review_description:
Bright colors and calming music, perfect for unwinding. I also really enjoyed the farm area.
The only thing I’d change is the bomb power-up, as the black color doesn’t quite fit the overall vibe.

A classic game, but a lot of fun with a leader board and meta achievements. Love it.

And adding MR would be great for this one.

Stuck on level 77. Too hard 🥹🥹

reviews.review_title: Cute version of mobile candy crush
reviews.review_description: I love the character! Comfy music and easy design. Nice simple game to rest and play.
many quest features in one game. AR mode, full hand tracking, hand skin customization... and thx for a lot of localizations
The same cubes, but now you can touch them with your hands

reviews.review_title: Prepare your Sexy Itchy Trigger Finger!
reviews.review_description:
Cheers from 80085games! It's crazy, we are live! Enjoy Touch-to-Match, relax, it's your safe place. 
And check out our Discord to test our new game Tank Mania earlier than others. 
BTW, we are making free-to-play games, it means that you can say "Thanks, dudes" for it with your money or with many stars. Have fun and chill! =*

Some traditional 2D platforms like Monopoly, Solitaire and now match 3 has been flst2VR'ed and shoehorned into a VR app.
This app is minimalist bare bones and lacks the intensity and detail of the Game of Thrones Legends match 3 app with characters and level up's and world building. Imagine seeing a building upgrade from level 5 to level 6 but in 3D immersive VR with a village diorama set up similar to Iron Guard, Demeo and Witchblood, etc
Loving this app. This app is the first I've ever heard of to take the bold audacious leap of bringing match 3 from 2D to VR.
This is still the very early days of VR. The room for improvement is vast.


For it being free and of such innovative high quality, I wouldn't be surprised if Touch To Match VR wins awards.
It's amazing! I enjoy this game every day! AR pass through looks amazing on Quest Pro, try it. And the cutest doughnut cat tho. Thanks a lot
this game is very neat ! i love how you can adjust the size of the game & move it around to your liking. i can definitely see myself making content in this game ! nice job 💪🏼

developer_response.body: thank you for your feedback :) If you have any suggestions for improvement, you can always write to us... The mail is temporarily out of order, but you can contact us in Discord https://discord.gg/s2FtFbcJ
